query.population: systematic literature review, systematic review, literature review
query.intervention: automation, automated tool, machine learning, text mining, NLP, natural language processing

basic.pubmed_query: ("systematic literature review"[Title/Abstract] OR "systematic review"[Title/Abstract] OR "literature review"[Title/Abstract]) AND (automation[Title/Abstract] OR "automated tool"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR "text mining"[Title/Abstract] OR NLP[Title/Abstract] OR "natural language processing"[Title/Abstract])
basic.semantic_query: systematic literature review automation automated tool machine learning

queries_per_iteration: systematic literature review automation automated tool machine learning
